description: Extract earthquake event data for the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake from the SeisComP database. Create a KML file at /home/ga/earthquake_catalog.kml. The KML must include a Document named 'SeisComP Earthquake Catalog' and at least one Placemark for the event. The Placemark must include the event's precise coordinates (longitude, latitude), origin time in ISO 8601 format, depth in km, and magnitude. Access the database using the sysop credentials (password: sysop).
